name: Isla Wright

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Arcana
basic.description: Isla attacks with tarot card magic dealing Dark elemental damage.

core.name: Horoscope
core.description: Isla attacks and grants one random buff to the entire team: Strength (+12% damage, 12s), The Magician (Shield equal to 12% DEF, 12s), or Wheel of Fortune (+12% Critical Hit Rate and Damage, 12s).

skill.name: Cosmic Emergence
skill.description: Inflicts Airborne. Activates The Star: instantly restores HP equal to 8% of Isla Wright's DEF to the entire team and removes all debuffs.

skill.name: Death Nova
skill.description: Knocks down target. Activates The Tower: increases Dark damage of Dark members by 5% (10s).

support.name: Crossing Stars
support.description: Inflicts Airborne. Removes Debuff Zones. Activates The Star (team heal + debuff removal) and grants one random buff (Strength, The Magician, or Wheel of Fortune).

qte.name: Celestial Discord
qte.description: Triggers via Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate, Stun, or Blind. Knocks down target. Grants one random buff.

ultimate.name: Arcana: The World / Arcana: Death
ultimate.description: Alternates between The World and Death based on last skill used. Inflicts Airborne. The World: restores HP equal to 15% DEF and grants Shield equal to 15% DEF (8s). Death: increases team Damage Increase by 6% of Isla's Damage Increase stat; Dark hunters gain +12% Ultimate Skill damage (16s).

passive.name: Tarot Mastery
passive.description: Determines ultimate variant (The World or Death) based on the last skill used. Stage 3 basic attack charges Power Gauge fully.

advancements: Death Nova charges second character's Power Gauge by 60% and reduces ultimate cooldown by 20s. Enhances Tower effect to +10% Dark damage (16s).
Team Speed increases 10%, immunity to Slow, Defense increases 12%.
Horoscope and Crossing Stars activate all three random buffs simultaneously.
Dark damage increases 3% and damage taken decreases 3% (stacks up to 3) for every Dark Element hunter on the team.

Enhanced World: grants Shield/healing of 25% DEF. Enhanced Death: grants 12% Damage Increase and 32% Ultimate damage boost for Dark hunters, plus Death Shepherd (+0.2% damage per 1% reduction to target's HP, stacks up to 16%).
